effect.subject: all_caps
effect.reserved_for: campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE', chart/infographic headlines, and brand name only

rule_text: [GENERAL] Do not use ALL CAPS for body copy, buttons, or subheads other than the allowed cases (campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE', chart/infographic headlines, brand name).
intent: Reserve all-caps to a small set of intentional uses.
summary: Avoid ALL CAPS in body copy, buttons, subheads except campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE', chart/infographic headlines, and brand name only.
